rows.notes: H32 should freeze the post-H30 later-explicit packet and the one-row extension gate without widening scope.
H32 is only positive if H30 stays narrow, H31 stays explicit, and R38 passes on the same substrate.
The canonical driver and short active-wave handoff should now route through H32, not stop at H30.
H32 should not soften R29/F3 or create automatic further compiler widening.
